mechanism_summary: Grimoire recombines xmlns attribute and valid XML/DOCTYPE scaffolding as generalized token/gap structures, repeatedly constructing the default-namespace path with NULL prefix at extreme hitcount (1959 vs 1) that cmplog's I2S-plus-havoc stack cannot structurally assemble.

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GAP-placeholder generalization and structural mutators splice prefixed-namespace XML fragments (e.g. '<b k:9') into well-formed documents wholesale, repeatedly producing prefixed namespace trees that cmplog's havoc+I2S stack builds only rarely.
